instruction: Reset the position of the small pink dot on the h1 icon.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/h1.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.243 4.493v7.5m0 0v7.502m0-7.501h10.5m0-7.5v7.5m0 0v7.501m4.501-8.627 2.25-1.5v10.126m0 0h-2.25m2.25 0h2.25"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#ec4899" cx="112" cy="132" r="2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />

  <circle id="dot" fill="#ec4899" cx="112" cy="112" r="2" />
</svg>
